data_description.repository: The base URL of your Lucia agent (e.g., http://localhost:5000)
data_description.api_key: The API key to authenticate with your agent (optional)
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable SSL certificate verification (disable for self-signed certs)

data_description.prompt_override: Optional: override the default system prompt sent with each request. Supports Jinja2 templates.

send_message.name: Send Message
send_message.description: Send a message to the Lucia agent.

message.name: Message
message.description: The message to send to the agent.
